# Summary

- What does this change do?
- Why is it needed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor/cleanup
- [ ] CI/build

## Verification

- [ ] `make validate`
- [ ] `./mtr-test-suite.sh --dry-run --no-summary`
- [ ] `./mtr-test-suite.sh --list-types`
- [ ] `./mtr-test-suite.sh --list-rounds`
- [ ] `pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -File .\NetTestSuite.ps1 -DryRun -Quiet` (if pwsh available)
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Release Readiness (when applicable)

- [ ] README Mermaid diagrams render correctly on GitHub
- [ ] Removed obsolete docs/plans are explicitly listed in PR description
- [ ] Changelog/version metadata updated for release target

## Risks / Notes

- Potential impact:
- Rollback plan:
